---
title: "third_pass_elvin"
author: "Elvin Liu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(labelled)
```

```{r}
# map labels from txt to csv
lines <- readLines("J362221_labels.txt")
var_lines <- lines[grepl("^ER[0-9A-Z]+\\s+", lines)]

label_df <- data.frame(
  var   = trimws(sub("^(ER[0-9A-Z]+)\\s+.*$", "\\1", var_lines)),
  label = trimws(sub("^ER[0-9A-Z]+\\s+(.*?)\\s{2,}\\d{0,2}\\s*$", "\\1", var_lines)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

df <- read.csv("J362221.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(label_df))) {
  v <- label_df$var[i]
  if (v %in% names(df)) {
    var_label(df[[v]]) <- label_df$label[i]
  }
}

# get rid of dupe family heads
df <- df %>%
  group_by(ER10002) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()

# convert NA values for 0, 8, and 9 values for TANF
df$ER11272[df$ER11272 == 0 | df$ER11272 == 8 | df$ER11272 == 9] <- NA

# remove NA values for TANF
df <- df[!is.na(df$ER11272), ]

# do the same manually for VA
# 1-4 are treated as 1, 8 and 9 as VA
# VA whether received variables
va_vars <- c(
  "ER11319", "ER14585", "ER18747", "ER22119",
  "ER26100", "ER37118", "ER43109"
)

df[va_vars] <- lapply(df[va_vars], function(x) {
  x[x %in% c(1,2,3,4)] <- 1
  x[x %in% c(8,9)] <- NA
  x
})

# 1 is Yes, 5 is No, TANF
df <- df[df$ER11272 == 1 | df$ER11272 == 5,]

# send 999999, 999998, 99999, 99998 to NA
df[df == 999999 | df == 999998 | df == 99999 | df == 99998] <- NA

# ER41027 <- Total Family Income 2007
# ER41029 <- Census Needs Standard 2007
# ER12079 <- TFI 1997
# ER12220 <- CNS 1997

# calculate 1997 TFI / CNS ratio
df$income_to_needs_ratio_1997 <- df$ER12079 / df$ER12220

# calculate 2007 TFI / CNS ratio
df$income_to_needs_ratio_2007 <- df$ER41027 / df$ER41029

# keep only people with 1997 and 2007 ratio
df <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(income_to_needs_ratio_1997) & !is.na(income_to_needs_ratio_2007))

# kick out TANF non-recipients with too high of income or no kids or too old
income_ratio_threshold <- quantile(df[df$ER11272 == 1,]$income_to_needs_ratio_1997, 0.90) # 95th percentile income of TANF recipients
df <- df[(df$ER11272 == 5 & df$income_to_needs_ratio_1997 <= income_ratio_threshold & df$ER10012 >= 1 & df$ER10009 < 65) | df$ER11272 == 1,]

# 233 families who received TANF in 1997 and have both 1997 and 2007 ratio
# 609 families who didn't receive TANF in 1997 and have both 1997 and 2007 ratio

# mapping from wide to long
wave_map <- list(
  "1997" = list(
    # Tracking IDs
    family_id        = "ER10002",
    person_id        = "ER33401",
    
    income_to_needs_ratio = "income_to_needs_ratio_1997",
    
    # Demographics & Geography
    state            = "ER12221",
    age              = "ER10009",
    sex              = "ER10010",
    n_children       = "ER10012",
    age_yng_child    = "ER10013",
    race             = "ER11848",
    education        = "ER12222",
    couple_status    = "ER12223C",
    relation         = "ER33403",
    emp_status       = "ER33411",
    rural_urban      = "ER12221A",
    
    # Housing & Environment
    type_du          = "ER10017",
    own_rent         = "ER10035",
    neither_own_rent = "ER10068",
    food_stamps      = "ER11065",
    
    # Health
    health_head      = "ER11723",
    health_wife      = "ER11727",
    parents_poor     = "ER11846",
    
    # Income & Needs
    total_income     = "ER12079",
    needs_standard   = "ER12220",
    
    # Transfer Income
    wtr_adc          = "ER11272",
    amt_adc          = "ER11273",
    wtr_ssi          = "ER11287",
    amt_ssi          = "ER11289",
    wtr_welfare      = "ER11303",
    amt_welfare      = "ER11304",
    wtr_va           = "ER11319",
    amt_va           = "ER11322",
    wtr_nonva_ret    = "ER11336",
    amt_nonva_ret    = "ER11337",
    wtr_annuities    = "ER11351",
    amt_annuities    = "ER11352",
    wtr_otr_pen      = "ER11366",
    amt_otr_pen      = "ER11367",
    wtr_unemp        = "ER11382",
    amt_unemp        = "ER11383",
    wtr_workers_comp = "ER11397",
    amt_workers_comp = "ER11398",
    wtr_child_supp   = "ER11412",
    amt_child_supp   = "ER11413"
  ),
  "2007" = list(
    # Tracking IDs
    family_id        = "ER36002",
    person_id        = "ER33901",
    
    income_to_needs_ratio = "income_to_needs_ratio_2007",
    
    # Demographics & Geography
    state            = "ER36003",
    age              = "ER36017",
    sex              = "ER36018",
    n_children       = "ER36020",
    age_yng_child    = "ER36021",
    race             = "ER40565",
    education        = "ER41037",
    couple_status    = "ER41041",
    relation         = "ER33903",
    emp_status       = "ER33913",
    rural_urban      = "ER41033",
    
    # Housing & Environment
    type_du          = "ER36024",
    own_rent         = "ER36028",
    neither_own_rent = "ER36075",
    food_stamps      = "ER36701",
    
    # Health
    health_head      = "ER38202",
    health_wife      = "ER39299",
    parents_poor     = "ER37728",
    
    # Income & Needs
    total_income     = "ER41027",
    needs_standard   = "ER41029",
    
    # Transfer Income
    wtr_adc          = "ER37068",
    amt_adc          = "ER37069",
    wtr_ssi          = "ER37084",
    amt_ssi          = "ER37086",
    wtr_welfare      = "ER37101",
    amt_welfare      = "ER37102",
    wtr_va           = "ER37118",
    amt_va           = "ER37119",
    wtr_nonva_ret    = "ER37134",
    amt_nonva_ret    = "ER37135",
    wtr_annuities    = "ER37150",
    amt_annuities    = "ER37151",
    wtr_otr_pen      = "ER37166",
    amt_otr_pen      = "ER37167",
    wtr_unemp        = "ER37183",
    amt_unemp        = "ER37184",
    wtr_workers_comp = "ER37199",
    amt_workers_comp = "ER37200",
    wtr_child_supp   = "ER37215",
    amt_child_supp   = "ER37216"
  )
)

# map from wide to long
df_long <- names(wave_map) %>%
  map_dfr(function(year_str) {
    
    year_mapping <- wave_map[[year_str]]
    
    # Remove person_id and family_id from the loop mapping to prevent tracking splits
    year_mapping$person_id <- NULL
    year_mapping$family_id <- NULL
    
    rename_vec <- unlist(year_mapping)
    rename_vec <- rename_vec[rename_vec %in% names(df)]
    select_vec <- setNames(rename_vec, names(rename_vec))
    
    # Extract the correct interview number code before stepping into mutate
    current_wave_num <- if (year_str == "1997") df$ER10002 else df$ER36002
    
    df %>%
      select(all_of(select_vec)) %>%
      mutate(
        year = as.integer(year_str),
        # Anchor both waves to the unique 1997 Family ID row number
        unique_family_id = df$ER10002,
        # Assign the pre-extracted vector safely
        wave_interview_num = current_wave_num
      )
  })

# Create a clean, time-invariant mapping of 1997 TANF status using your original df
tanf_status_map <- df %>%
  mutate(tanf_status = if_else(ER11272 == 1, "TANF Recipient", "Control Group")) %>%
  select(unique_family_id = ER10002, tanf_status)

# Merge this structural indicator back into your long-form panel
df_long <- df_long %>%
  left_join(tanf_status_map, by = "unique_family_id")

# Move your unified tracking key and year metrics to the front
df_long <- df_long %>%
  select(unique_family_id, wave_interview_num, year, tanf_status, income_to_needs_ratio, everything())
```

```{r}
# Verify every panel tracker contains exactly 2 observations
panel_counts <- df_long %>% 
  count(unique_family_id)

table(panel_counts$n) 
# This should show 100% of your records sit in the "2" category!
```

```{r}
# graphs of data!
```
